Keyboard-first AI text actions. Select text, press the shortcut, and transform — rewrite, summarize, translate, and more.

Select any text on any page, press a shortcut, and choose your action. The result drops back in place of what you selected. 

Free:
• Rewrite, summarize, fix grammar, explain, shorten, expand, key points
• Translate to 41 languages
• Read aloud in any voice your browser supports
• Runs on Chrome's built-in AI. Fast, private, no API key needed.

Pro: ($5 per month)
• Bring your own AI. Run models locally, or use your own cloud AI keys.
• Always use the latest models. One click pulls your provider's newest releases.
• Create action chains that run one action after another
• Create your own custom actions
• Per-site profiles with ready-made actions, like tweet, reply, and thread on X

Your text stays yours:
Actions run on your device through Chrome's AI. Nothing leaves your computer. If you connect a cloud AI with your own key, your text goes to that service. We never see it. Full policy at clipaction.dev/privacy.

Built-in AI requires Chrome 138+. Other Chromium browsers (Brave, Edge, Opera) work but need a cloud API key or Ollama.
You shouldn't have to apply 50 times alone. Tailored CV, real cover letter, and every form answer — in 60 seconds.

You apply, and apply, and apply — and most of it never reaches a human. Silent machines read your CV first, looking for words you didn't know to use. They decide, in seconds, whether you exist.

Your CV didn't fail. The filter did.

That's why ApplyFuel exists. Open any job posting, hit the side panel, and get a tailored CV — rewritten with the keywords those machines look for — plus a real cover letter and every form answer. What used to take fifteen minutes of pasting jobs into a chatbot — and tweaking prompts until the output didn't sound robotic — becomes a 60-second click, right next to the posting.

────────────────
WHAT YOU GET
────────────────

• Tailored CV. Rewrites your base CV per job — keywords, tone, structure. Recruiter-grade PDF in four templates.
• Cover letters that sound like you. No "I am writing to express my interest." Specific, grounded, sendable.
• Every form answer, ready. "Why this company?" "Greatest weakness?" Generated from your real profile and the job context.
• One-click job extraction. Reads job postings on the page you have open, across 56+ job boards and applicant tracking systems.
• Application pipeline. Saved → Applied → Interview → Offer. Every job you touch is tracked in one place.

────────────────
WHY APPLYFUEL
────────────────

• Sixty seconds, not fifteen minutes. No chatbot tabs, no prompt rewrites, no tab juggling.
• Honest by design. The AI is grounded in your real profile. It will never invent skills, languages, or experience you don't have.
• You stay in control. ApplyFuel reads a posting only when you click Extract Job. It never auto-submits, simulates clicks, or runs in the background.
• No subscription. Pay-as-you-go credits. Top up from $5. No monthly expiration.
• Pick the intensity. Match the AI tier to how competitive the role is — Spark and Ember available today, Blaze and Inferno coming soon.

────────────────
HOW IT WORKS
────────────────

1. Install the extension. Sign up free.
2. Upload your CV once. We learn your story.
3. Open any job. Hit Cmd+Shift+S (or Alt+S on Windows). Click Extract → Generate.
4. Copy. Paste. Submit. Done.

────────────────
FREE TO START
────────────────

Generous free tier every month: 6 CVs, 9 cover letters, 15 job extractions, 30 form answers. Need more? Top up from $5. No subscription. No auto-renewal. No monthly credit expiration.

────────────────
PRIVACY
────────────────

Your profile and CV are stored so you can use them anywhere. Job descriptions you extract are sent to our backend for AI processing. We never train on your data. We never sell it. We never auto-submit on your behalf.

Privacy policy: https://applyfuel.com/privacy

────────────────
SUPPORT
────────────────

mh@mahadihassan.com — a real person reads every email.

Job hunting is exhausting. We made it honest. Never apply alone.

Fast text editing: AI Rewrite for emails, posts & chats — AI sentence rewriter, rewrite tone, shorten or expand.

AI Rewrite helps you rephrase selected text for the exact situation: email replies, business messages, short answers, formal notes, or a calm support tone. It works right inside the page, so you can improve wording without breaking focus.

What you get with AI Rewrite
 • Clearer phrasing with the same meaning
 • Quick edits for chats, comments, docs, and posts
 • Consistent tone across repeated replies
 • Fewer awkward sentences and less filler

When to use it
 • You wrote something too emotional and want a calmer version
 • You need a shorter reply that still sounds polite
 • The message is correct, but the wording feels clumsy
 • You want a more professional style without sounding cold

How it works
 1. Highlight text (or paste it)
 2. Choose a style: Shorter, Polite, Friendlier, Formal
 3. Review, tweak, and use the result
 4. Iterate again if you want a different tone

Modes and keywords you can use
 • AI Rewriter for quick rewording and clarity
 • AI sentence rewriter for single lines and replies
 • AI sentence rewrite for fixing awkward sentences
 • AI paragraph rewriter for longer blocks
 • AI tone Rewriter to keep style consistent
 • Rewriter AI when you need a tighter version

Common tasks
 1. Rewrite my sentence to sound clear and confident
 2. Rewrite with AI for a formal email reply
 3. AI to human when the draft feels robotic
 4. AI to humanized for a warmer, more natural rhythm


Use cases
 • Customer support replies and follow-ups
 • Outreach and sales messages
 • Social posts, comments, and chats
 • Documentation and internal notes
 • Turning rough drafts into readable text

What makes the output feel natural
 • Humanizer options that reduce template wording
 • Sentence rewriter edits that keep your intent
 • Paragraph rewriter controls for structure and flow
 • Human tone that reads like a real person
 • Optional simplification for complex text

Quality controls you can apply
 • Keep facts unchanged: names, numbers, links, and key details
 • Prefer active voice for clearer messages
 • Remove repetition and tighten long sentences
 • Keep your own voice by editing the first line

Tips for better results
 • Include the audience: client, colleague, friend, or public post
 • Add a short goal like be direct, be polite, or be concise
 • If the result is too formal, switch to Friendlier or Polite and try again
 • For long text, start with AI paragraph rewriter, then finish with sentence rewriter
 • If you need more personality, add one sentence of context and rerun

Example prompts you can try
1️⃣ Make this reply shorter and more professional
2️⃣ Rephrase this paragraph, keep the same meaning
3️⃣ Make the tone friendly but firm
4️⃣  Simplify this message for a quick chat response


Available styles in the extension
 • Shorter
 • Polite
 • Friendlier
 • Formal

Tool comparisons
 • Some users search Walter or Walter Writes AI
 • Others look for Rewritely AI

AI Rewrite focuses on speed and consistency: fewer steps, more iterations, and text that is ready to send.

Why people keep it installed
 • Reduce misunderstandings in sensitive messages
 • Move faster on repetitive writing tasks
 • Turn long, messy text into something readable
 • Keep your tone stable across different conversations

Q&A
Q: Can I keep formatting like line breaks?
 A: Yes, you can keep structure and then adjust the final text.

Q: Will it add new facts?
 A: It is designed to keep your meaning, not invent details.

Q: Is it useful for non-native English?
 A: Yes, it helps you sound clear and professional.

Privacy and workflow notes
 • You stay in control: review before you send
 • You can edit the result and keep your own style
 • It is designed for everyday writing, not for generating facts
 • Keep confidential data out of prompts if you do not want it processed

FAQ
Q: Can I keep meaning unchanged?
 A: Yes, AI Rewrite is designed to preserve meaning while improving wording.

Q: Is it only for short text?
 A: No, AI paragraph rewriter and AI sentence rewriter handle longer blocks.

Q: Does it help with artificial intelligence drafts?
 A: Yes, use AI Rewriter and humanizer options to refine them.

Q: Can I use it for quick edits only?
 A: Yes, it works in seconds.

Q: Will it work for different tones?
 A: Yes, AI tone rewriter helps you switch style fast.

AI Rewrite is a focused tool for people who write every day: select, refine, and send. If you want fast, readable text without extra steps, AI Rewrite fits the job.
Automatically converts smart quotes to standard quotes when copying from Lark documents

Lark Quote Converter is a Chrome extension designed to automatically convert smart quotes to standard quotes when copying from Lark documents. This extension operates when users copy or cut text, ensuring that the clipboard contains text with standard quote formatting.

Self Crypto Wallet: ETH, BTC, KDA & more!
Everything in the blockchain made easy

This Web3 non-custodial wallet extension offers secure and convenient cryptocurrency management with support for multiple blockchain networks (multichain). A key feature is self name resolution, which allows users to send crypto using self names that are automatically converted to the recipient's address. This innovative functionality enhances user experience by simplifying transactions and improving address management.

Never lose track of what you've copied again! Clipboard History is a simple and privacy-focused Chrome extension that automatically saves your text copies and lets you easily access, search, and reuse them.

**Features:**

*   **Automatic History:** Automatically captures text you copy (Ctrl+C / Cmd+C) while browsing.
*   **Manual Save:** Option to manually save the current clipboard content via the popup.
*   **Instant Access Popup:** Click the extension icon to view your recent clipboard history.
*   **Search:** Quickly find previous entries by typing in the search bar.
*   **Copy to Clipboard:** Simply click any item in the history to copy it back to your clipboard.
*   **Delete Items:** Remove unwanted or sensitive items individually.
*   **Privacy First:** All history is stored **locally** on your computer. Your data is never sent to external servers.
*   **Limited History:** Keeps a rolling history of the latest 50 items to save space.
*   **Multi-language:** Available in English and Chinese (based on your browser settings).

**How it Works:**

The extension uses a content script to detect copy actions on web pages and securely saves the text to your local browser storage. The popup provides a clean interface to manage your history.
Automatically masks your private info when pasting into AI chats, restores originals when copying back. Set it once, forget it.

Your private data is leaking into AI every time you paste.
Every time you copy text from an email, document, or chat and paste it into an AI assistant, you're sending names, email addresses, phone numbers, client details, and financial data to AI companies. PrivacyVeil stops that — silently, automatically, without changing how you work.
HOW IT WORKS

Set up your protected words once — your name, company, client names, project codes
Use AI normally — just paste as you always do
PrivacyVeil intercepts the paste and replaces protected words with safe placeholders like [PERSON_1], [COMPANY_1]
The AI sees only the placeholders — never your real data
When you copy the AI's response, originals are silently restored to your clipboard
Paste anywhere — your real data is back, as if nothing happened

Zero clicks during daily use. Set it once, forget it's there.
WHAT'S DETECTED AUTOMATICALLY
Beyond your custom words, PrivacyVeil catches sensitive patterns without any setup:

Email addresses
Phone numbers
Credit card numbers
IBANs
Social Security Numbers
Currency amounts

FEATURES
✓ Silent clipboard filter — auto-shields on paste, auto-restores on copy
✓ Custom protected words with categories (Person, Company, Project, Address)
✓ Inline "Protect" pill — select any word in AI chat, click to protect it forever
✓ Side Panel — paste from desktop apps, shield, and send to AI in one click
✓ Right-click context menu — "Protect this text" on any selection
✓ Works on all major AI chat platforms
PRIVACY FIRST

100% local processing — everything runs in your browser
No data sent to any server
No analytics, no tracking, no cookies
No account required
Your protected words never leave your machine
Only activates on specific AI chat sites — no access to other websites

FREE PLAN
5 custom protected words, all auto-detection patterns, all supported AI platforms, side panel, inline protect pill.
PRO PLAN ($4/month)
Unlimited protected words, placeholder instructions for better restore accuracy, import/export filter lists. Coming soon: custom AI site support, session history & audit log.
WHO IT'S FOR

Professionals who paste client emails, contracts, or reports into AI
Lawyers, consultants, and compliance managers handling confidential data
Freelancers working under NDAs
Anyone who uses AI daily and cares about not leaking personal information

PERMISSIONS EXPLAINED

Storage — saves your protected words and settings locally
Clipboard Read/Write — reads clipboard on copy to restore originals, writes restored text back
Context Menus — adds "Protect this text" to right-click menu
Side Panel — enables the desktop-app paste workflow
Active Tab — allows side panel to send shielded text to the AI chat

Questions? Email support@ties.digital
Privacy Policy: https://privacyveil.ties.digital/privacy.html
Add the iconic NomNom overlay to any image on Twitter/X!
Quickly add Nom Nom the hungry hamster to any image on any twitter posts that contains an image.

Stop Switching Tabs. Start Flowing.

We are honored to contribute a new chapter to your legendary Ctrl + C & Ctrl + V journey. Mercury Clipboard isn't just a tool; it's a muscle memory upgrade for your workflow.

🚀 Say Hello to Your New Favorite Shortcut: Alt + V (Mac Users: Option + V)

Forget about reaching for the top-right corner of your browser to click a tiny icon. That’s the old way. With Mercury, your clipboard history appears instantly, right where your focus is.

✨ Modern, Liquid, & Fast We hated clunky, boring extension popups too. That’s why we built Mercury with a "Liquid Flow" interface. It’s designed to feel native, smooth, and incredibly fast.

Smart Selection: Mercury intelligently highlights the item you likely need (the previous one), so you can just hit Enter and keep working.

Visual Feedback: No guessing. See exactly what you are pasting.

🔒 Your Data, Your Device (Zero Cloud) In an era of data leaks, we chose the radical path: Privacy First.

Local Storage: Your clipboard history is stored securely on your local device. It never touches our servers.

Ghost Mode (RAM Only): For the ultra-paranoid and security professionals, Mercury operates in RAM. Once you close the browser, your history vanishes forever. No trace left on the disk.

🛡️ Open Source & Auditable True privacy requires transparency. We have nothing to hide. Mercury is fully Open Source. You are invited to review the source code and verify our security promises directly via our official website.

How It Works:

Copy text as usual (Ctrl + C / Cmd + C).

Press Alt + V (or Option + V on Mac).

Select from your recent history and paste instantly.

Simple. Fast. Secure. Welcome to the Mercury flow.
Read faster with Flash (RSVP) and Bionic reading modes. Free plan available.

CLEAR YOUR READING BACKLOG                                
                                                                                                                                                                                                                     Newsletters, reports, research papers — they pile up faster than you can read them. SpeedLens helps Indian professionals get through their reading list without falling behind. Two modes, zero gimmicks, priced in rupees.                                                                                                                                                                                                           
                                                            
  ─────────────────────────────────────────                                                                                                                                                                          
   
  TWO MODES. ONE PURPOSE.                                                                                                                                                                                            
                                                            
  ⚡ FLASH MODE (RSVP)
  Words appear one at a time, centered on screen. Your eyes stay fixed — no movement, no wandering, no losing your place. Best for high-volume reading: newsletters, news articles, and anything in your backlog that
   needs to get done.                                                                                                                                                                                                
   
  👁 BIONIC MODE                                                                                                                                                                                                      
  The first 40% of every word is bolded. Your brain fills in the rest — you read in a natural flow, just faster. Best for reading that requires retention: research papers, client reports, and complex material you
  need to remember.                                                                                                                                                                                                  
   
  ─────────────────────────────────────────                                                                                                                                                                          
                                                            
  THREE WAYS TO READ

  1. Select any text on a webpage — a widget appears instantly with Flash and Bionic options                                                                                                                         
  2. Click the toolbar icon → Read This Page — extracts the full article automatically, no selecting needed
  3. Copy from a PDF, email, or doc → Paste & Read — works with anything on your clipboard                                                                                                                           
                                                            
  ─────────────────────────────────────────                                                                                                                                                                          
                                                            
  WHO READS WITH SPEEDLENS                                                                                                                                                                                           
   
  → Product Managers: Flash through competitor analysis and reports before standup                                                                                                                                   
  → Analysts & Finance Professionals: Clear five newsletters before markets open
  → Researchers: Triage paper abstracts in 90 seconds — decide what deserves a deep read
  → Consultants & Lawyers: Get through dense client documents with retention, not just speed                                                                                                                         
   
  ─────────────────────────────────────────                                                                                                                                                                          
                                                            
  PRICING (Indian Rupees — pay via UPI, net banking, or card)                                                                                                                                                        
   
  Free — unlimited reads, no credit card required
  Pro Monthly — ₹99/month, all themes + supports development                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            
  Pro Yearly — ₹799/year (~₹67/month), all themes + supports development
  Lifetime — ₹1,999 one-time, all themes forever                                                                                                                                                             
   
  No international card needed. Payments via Razorpay.                                                                                                                                                               
                                                            
  ─────────────────────────────────────────                                                                                                                                                                          
   
  KEYBOARD SHORTCUTS                                                                                                                                                                                                 
                                                            
  Space — Pause / Resume
  ← → — Adjust reading speed
  R — Restart from beginning
  F — Switch to Flash mode
  B — Switch to Bionic mode
  Esc — Close reader                                                                                                                                                                                                 
   
  ─────────────────────────────────────────                                                                                                                                                                          
                                                            
  PRIVACY

SpeedLens does not collect, store, or transmit the text you read. Your reading stays entirely on your device. The only data we handle is your email if you subscribe to Pro, processed securely by Razorpay.

Never lose copied text again. Saves everything you copy — text, links, code. Search, pin & organize. Free & Pro.

📋 ClipVault — Never Lose Copied Text Again

Your clipboard only holds one item. Copy something new and the old one is gone forever. ClipVault fixes that — it saves everything you copy and lets you find it instantly.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

HOW IT WORKS

1. Install ClipVault and copy text as you normally do
2. Click the ClipVault icon or press Ctrl+Shift+V
3. Your entire clipboard history appears — searchable and organized
4. Click any item to instantly copy it back to your clipboard
5. That's it. Never lose copied text again.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

FREE FEATURES

✓ Saves up to 25 clipboard items automatically
✓ Smart type detection — auto-categorizes text, links, code, emails, phone numbers, and colors
✓ Click any item to instantly re-copy it
✓ Search through your entire clipboard history
✓ Filter by type — All, Text, Links, Code, Email, Pinned
✓ Pin important items so they stay at the top
✓ Delete individual items or clear all history
✓ Manually add text to your history
✓ Keyboard shortcut — Ctrl+Shift+V to open
✓ Works on any website
✓ No account required

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

PRO FEATURES ($12.99 one-time payment)

⚡ 1000 clipboard items — vs 25 on the free plan
⚡ Export history to Markdown — download a clean, readable file of everything you've copied
⚡ Smart categories & type badges
⚡ Lifetime access — pay once, use forever, all future updates included

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

PERFECT FOR

- Developers copying code snippets between files and projects
- Writers collecting research quotes and notes
- Designers saving hex colors and asset links
- Recruiters copying candidate info across job boards
- Students gathering research from multiple sources
- Anyone who copies and pastes more than once a day

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

WHY CLIPVAULT?

- Privacy first — all data stored locally on your device, nothing sent to servers
- Lightweight — won't slow down your browsing
- Smart detection — automatically knows if you copied a link, code, email, or plain text
- Beautiful dark UI — clean, modern interface that doesn't get in your way
- Keyboard shortcut — Ctrl+Shift+V for instant access

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

UPGRADE TO PRO

Get a lifetime Pro license for just $12.99 — no subscriptions, no recurring charges. Click the upgrade banner inside the extension to purchase.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

SUPPORT

Having issues? Visit our support page or leave a review and we'll get back to you.

This extension modifies the original IMDb page, so it's more suitable for MediaBiz researchers.

This is an IMDb extension, which will help researchers to work more efficient. The most important data will be displayed on the main site, with some additional links for further research. 

For this extension to work properly you need to login into your IMDb account (or register and login if you don't have an account ), then go to "Account Settings" where you will find under "Preferences" the section "Content Settings". Here you have to set the "Title display country/region" to "Original" and check the box for "Contributors". All you have to do is now enable the extension in the upper right corner in Google Chrome. Now the extension should work. 

Feel free to suggest any additional ideas that would make the extension even better!
A professional clipboard manager with advanced features and modern UI

The Smart Clipboard Manager is a powerful and intuitive Chrome extension designed to supercharge your copy-pasting workflow. Say goodbye to the limitations of a single-item clipboard! This intelligent manager automatically saves everything you copy, making it effortlessly accessible, searchable, and organized. Whether you're dealing with text snippets, code, links, or a mix of content, Smart Clipboard Manager helps you stay productive by ensuring you never lose a copied item again. With features like content type categorization, search functionality, and customizable settings, managing your copied data has never been easier.

Key Features:

Automatic Content Saving: Every item you copy is automatically saved to your clipboard history.
Categorized Organization: Content is automatically categorized into "Text," "Links," and "Code" for quick filtering.
Pinned Items: Easily pin important or frequently used clipboard items for quick access.
Powerful Search: Quickly find specific clipboard items using the integrated search bar.
Customizable Storage Limit: Set the maximum number of items to store in your clipboard history (default is 100).
Auto-copy on Selection (Toggle): Option to automatically copy selected text to the clipboard.
Save Text Formatting (Toggle): Choose whether to preserve text formatting when copying.
Show Notification on Copy (Toggle): Get a notification when an item is successfully copied to the Smart Clipboard.
Auto-detect Content Type (Toggle): Automatically categorize copied content.
Export/Import Clipboard Data: Backup your clipboard history or transfer it between devices.
Clear All/Delete Items: Easily clear your entire clipboard history or delete individual items.
User-Friendly Interface: Clean and intuitive design for seamless navigation and management.
A Chrome extension that allows you to paste rich text (URL + title) in different formats depending on the website. e.g.) "[{{title}}]({{url}})" for GitHub, "{{title}} - {{url}}" for Twitter.
Click the NeoAI icon to access Code Assistant/Review features

This extension enhances your code by generating comments, adding docstrings, inserting logging and error handling, refactoring selected code, generating test cases, providing detailed explanations, delivering an overall code review and also for generating Repository documentation. It supports in Google Colab, Bigquery, Snowflake and Databricks.
Viral score, views/hour, and AI post tools for X

Viraly is a smart Chrome extension for X (Twitter) that helps you track post performance and create better content. It shows viral scores, views per hour, and engagement insights directly on posts so you can quickly spot trending content. The app also includes AI-powered tools to help you write stronger posts, improve reach, and grow your audience faster.
VRM 音声認識を用いた多機能マウスジェスチャ
音声認識を用いてテキストに音声入力したり、Chromeの利便性を高めるためのマウスジェスチャです。

この拡張機能は音声入力ができる多機能マウスジェスチャで、以下の機能があります。
Chromeに表示されたテキスト・テキストエリアに音声入力
音声入力でグーグル検索
音声入力できるメモ
音声を再生しているタブをミュートにする、ミュートを解除する
ページの上下にスクロール、ページのトップとボトムにスクロール
コピー＆ペースト
Chromeを最小化する
履歴を戻る
履歴を進む
タブを閉じる
ページを再読み込みする

※https:で始まるサイトだけに対応しています。
※音声認識が制限されたサイトでは、この機能は動作しません。
※ほとんどのテキストに音声入力できますが、一部のテキストには対応していません。

A collection of tools that provide daily browser efficiency
A collection of tools that provide daily browser efficiency，Support quick switching of search engines such as Google and Yahoo and Support shortcut keys to quickly fill in preset content
Paste with line breaks and whitespace preserved on Facebook, Instagram, and any whitelisted site.

Tired of Facebook and Instagram squashing your nicely formatted posts into one giant paragraph the moment you paste them in? This extension fixes that.
 
When you paste text into a whitelisted site, Line Break Converter intercepts the paste, rewrites the empty lines with an invisible non-breaking space so the platform won't strip them, preserves runs of double-spaces, and inserts the result into the field for you — instantly, with no extra clicks.
 
WHAT IT DOES
 
• Preserves line breaks when pasting into Facebook posts, comments, and Messenger
 
• Preserves line breaks when pasting Instagram captions and bios
 
• Optional: automatically adds a blank line between paragraphs for that clean, readable promo-post look
 
• Preserves multiple consecutive spaces using non-breaking spaces
 
WHITELIST CONTROL
 
The extension only runs on sites you explicitly add to its whitelist. Facebook and Instagram are pre-configured. Add or remove any domain from the popup at any time. Every other site behaves exactly as it normally would — your pastes are untouched.
 
MANUAL CONVERTER
 
For sites you don't want to whitelist, the popup includes a paste-in/copy-out manual converter. Paste, click Convert & copy, paste the result anywhere.
 
PRIVACY
 
• No accounts, no logins, no tracking, no analytics.
 
• No data is sent anywhere. Your settings (on/off, whitelist, paragraph-spacing option) are stored in Chrome's built-in sync storage so they follow your profile across devices.
 
• The extension reads paste events only on whitelisted pages, transforms the text locally in your browser, and inserts it into the field. Nothing leaves your machine.
 
HOW TO USE
 
1. Click the extension icon to open the popup.
 
2. Confirm the whitelist (facebook.com and instagram.com are there by default).
 
3. Copy text from anywhere.
 
4. Click into the Facebook post / Instagram caption / comment box.
 
5. Paste. Done.
